title: Phaedo Consultation Receipt
description: One entry in the encrypted, append-only, vault-held record of resolved consultations (Phaedo Protocol v0.1 §10.6). Receipts NEVER leave the device — this schema documents the at-rest plaintext shape inside the phaedo:receipts:enc:v0.1 envelope, not a wire artifact. Captures the request descriptor and the response signal fields only; never layer content or the projection.

receipt_id.description: UUID v4. Stable identifier; the handle for the user_action update.

via.description: Which tool resolved it: a full consultation, or a matched deterministic pre-flight (only MATCHED pre-flights produce receipts).

agent_id.description: The requesting agent's self-identifier, when provided.

summary.description: The agent's action description (agent-provided text, not fingerprint content).

drivers.description: OPTIONAL provenance (§10.4-safe — LOCAL audit only, never in the consult response): the Decision&Risk cues that drove an inferred consultation. Present for inferred `phaedo_consult` resolutions with at least one fired cue; absent for deterministic pre-flights and abstains. Carries direction/confidence/evidence-basis, NOT layer text.

lean.description: Signed direction the cue pushed the score (scalar cues).

value.description: Resolved value, for categorical cues (e.g. ask_first).

basis.description: Evidence basis: observed | corroborated | self_reported | text_scan.

origin.description: OPTIONAL — the act-as-me channel: `self` (default) = the driving cue came from the subject's own behavior; `delegation` = from the subject correcting an agent acting on their behalf (a delegation-origin signal won this dimension). Lets the subject's local audit see WHEN a consult was driven by an act-as-me preference rather than act-for-me.

user_action.description: null at write time. The ONLY field mutable after write — set when override data exists (what the subject actually did with the agent's action). The seed of agreement tracking (M5).
